name: Group Text Payload
description: Tests group text message payload: channel_hash(1) + cipher_mac(2) + ciphertext. The encrypted plaintext is the GRP_TXT inner format: timestamp(4, LE) + flags(1) + "<sender_name>: <body>".

vectors.description: Group text message with known channel secret
vectors.notes: Channel hash = SHA256(channel_secret)[0] = 0x72. Inner plaintext is the GRP_TXT format: timestamp 1700000000 (00F15365 LE) + flags 0x00 (TXT_TYPE_PLAIN) + the message "alice: hello mesh" (sender name "alice"). 22 bytes, AES-128-ECB zero-padded to 32. AES key = first 16 bytes of channel secret; MAC = HMAC-SHA256(channel_secret, ciphertext)[0..1].

vectors.description: Group text with tampered MAC must fail
vectors.notes: Same ciphertext as grp-txt-001 but MAC zeroed. Verification must fail.
